query: SELECT CONCAT('ORDER:', o.id, '|status:', o.status, '|driver:', COALESCE(o.driver_id, 'null')) as info FROM orders o WHERE o.status IN ('pending', 'accepted', 'ready_for_pickup') AND o.driver_id IS NULL; SELECT CONCAT('OFFER:', oo.id, '|order:', oo.order_id, '|driver:', oo.driver_id, '|status:', oo.status) as info FROM order_offers oo ORDER BY oo.id DESC LIMIT 15
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT CONCAT('ORDER:', o.id, '|status:', o.status, '|driver:', COALESCE(o.driver_id, 'null')) as info FROM orders o WHERE o.status IN ('pending', 'accepted', 'ready_for_pickup') AND o.driver_id IS NULL; SELECT CONCAT('OFFER:', oo.id, '|order:', oo.order_id, '|driver:', oo.driver_id, '|status:', oo.status) as info FROM order_offers oo ORDER BY oo.id DESC LIMIT 15
